notes: v2.4.2 — Tag classification policy alignment with real subscription data. A 167-tag pull from a live Qualys subscription revealed that the QPS Tag search endpoint returns reservedType=null AND createdBy=null on every tag, including unambiguously Qualys-shipped tags (Business Units, Cloud Agent, Internet Facing Assets, EASM family) and connector-bound tags (AWS/Azure/GCP, vpc-*, Connector Discovery). Pre-v2.4.2 _is_user_created consulted only those two fields, so 40/167 (24%) of tags mis-classified as user-created — only_user filter showed Qualys-shipped tags, cards rendered without [SYSTEM] pill, migration tooling treated connector tags as portable. _classify_tag_origin already had the right answer via the hard-coded protective name-pattern lists (_SYSTEM_PROVISIONED_NAMES, _CONNECTOR_NAME_PATTERNS) plus the CLOUD_ASSET rule_type heuristic — these were 100% accurate on the system cluster and ~96% on the connector cluster against the 167-tag pull, but were never consulted from the classification path. Fix: upsert_tag now derives is_user_created from tag_origin first (system/connector → 0) before falling through to the reservedType/sentinel logic; search_tags only_user/only_system filter rewritten to use the effective is_user_created via a CASE expression that mirrors _apply_classification_override exactly, so the filter and the rendered card always agree. Operator override via /api/tags/<id>/classify remains the durable safety valve. Also bundles cleanup of 8 pre-existing stale tag tests that had been red since the v2.1 tag overhaul (suite 240/248 → 249/249). See BUGS.md BUG-018 and CHANGELOG.md v2.4.2 for the full incident write-up.

steps.comment: Update dependency list FIRST so pip install works
Install dependencies BEFORE replacing code — prevents import errors on reload
Replace entire app/ directory with new code (deps already installed)
Update entrypoint with self-heal logic for next restart
Ensure entrypoint is executable after copy
Update the manifest itself for future updates
Save version SHA and restart Gunicorn workers
